claims.claim: Echem-conditioned optical/video residuals are the strongest longer-horizon weak-label signal.
claims.do_not_claim: Do not claim deployable degradation prediction or mechanism.
claims.required_falsification_test: Require source-balanced or leave-source performance above matched null after acquisition/context residualization.
claims.strongest_counterevidence: Future16 labels remain weak and source/acquisition imbalance is still present.
claims.strongest_support: 132 metric-search variants promoted for follow-up; top tournament hypothesis: Longer-horizon future-drop signal is strongest when optical video descriptors are conditioned by echem regime.

claims.claim: Short-horizon future8 labels are acquisition/context dominated and should not drive mechanisms alone.
claims.do_not_claim: Do not use future8 AUC as a physical degradation detector without residualized controls.
claims.required_falsification_test: Show future8 video/physics signal survives source-balanced acquisition residualization and shift/null controls.
claims.strongest_counterevidence: Some physics-only future8 signals remain above chance in selected audits.
claims.strongest_support: Prior context audits and metric penalties flag acquisition/design-context variants as leakage guarded.

claims.claim: Manual ROI/front QC is the decisive feedback signal before accepting front or diffusion-like claims.
claims.do_not_claim: Do not report calibrated front/diffusion mechanisms from automatic masks alone.
claims.required_falsification_test: Populate manual labels and rerun manual-QC-gated front/echem effects.
claims.strongest_counterevidence: No manually accepted front labels are available in the current derived summaries.
claims.strongest_support: QC decision ledger has 47 candidates, including 3 possible accept-first rows.

claims.claim: The defensible physics claim is optical phase/front movement, not calibrated lithium diffusion.
claims.do_not_claim: Do not call apparent front slopes diffusion coefficients without calibration/QC evidence.
claims.required_falsification_test: Require pixel-size provenance, timing provenance, stable accepted masks, and manual front labels.
claims.strongest_counterevidence: Some automatic front proxies show coherent directionality and kinetics.
claims.strongest_support: Calibration risk register and front audits preserve apparent-proxy wording.

claims.claim: Agentic AI is useful here as a benchmark-driven planner and critic over real derived evidence.
claims.do_not_claim: Do not frame the agentic layer as autonomous discovery; it is an auditable prioritizer.
claims.required_falsification_test: Show top-ranked agentic follow-up candidates reproduce or improve guarded held-out evidence.
claims.strongest_counterevidence: The workflow is deterministic and does not yet use external literature retrieval or online model-generated code repair.
claims.strongest_support: Metric search aggregated 733 rows from 15 metric tables.

guardrail: The ledger tracks claim status and falsification requirements. It does not convert weak labels or automatic masks into validated mechanisms.
